selectedSlice: Add recent activity cues to Mentor Dashboard assigned-student cards.
repoGroundedFindings: docs/functionality-language-audit.md still flagged mentor cards as needing richer recent-activity groupings.
workspace.js rendered mentor status signals and actions without timing context for work, meetings, or presentation planning.
functions/api/mentor/dashboard.ts already returned mentor-scoped assigned students only, so adding bounded timestamps stayed inside existing access rules.
changes: functions/api/mentor/dashboard.ts now returns latest submission, mentor meeting, and presentation timestamps for assigned students.
workspace.js now renders a recent-activity line on Mentor Dashboard cards with work, meeting, and presentation timing cues.
tests/mentor-dashboard.integration.test.mjs and tests/workspace-app.test.mjs now cover the new route fields and rendered mentor activity cues.
notes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundaries changed.
No new actions, routes, or contact data were added.
nextRecommended: If hosted proof is still blocked, inspect the student-safe mentor support workflow shape before adding mentor URL state.
